productDisplayName: Nike Men Manu Cshss Training Grey T-Shirts
description: CompositionGrey t-shirt made of Dri-Fit 100% polyester fabric, with ribbed crew neck and fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, contrast tape at shoulders, sleeves and sides, short sleeves, club badge on left chest, meshed on the sides and back and screen print on the centre back neckFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow fabric to lie on itself when wetDo not iron or dry cleanOffering ventilation where it’s needed most, this manchester united t-shirt from nike offers lightweight fit and tough Red Devil’s pride. Team this tee with performance shorts when playing and with denims when relaxing.
